parties.title: 1. Parties to the Agreement
parties.content: This Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into by the following parties:

client.label: Client
client.description: The individual or entity receiving services ("Client" or "You")

scope.title: 2. Scope of Services
scope.content: Under this Agreement, the Service Provider agrees to provide the following digital services to the Client (specific scope detailed in the Project Confirmation or Statement of Work):
items: Web Development Services: Including frontend development, backend development, database design, API development
Mobile App Development Services: Including iOS apps, Android apps, cross-platform app development
Mini Program Development Services: Including WeChat mini programs and other platform mini programs
SaaS Subscription Services: Providing cloud-based Software as a Service subscriptions
Technical Consulting Services: Providing technical architecture design, code review, technology selection consulting

deliverables.title: 3. Deliverables
deliverables.content: The Service Provider will deliver outcomes as follows:
items: Web Development Projects: Source code, database architecture, deployment documentation, user manual
Mobile App Projects: Application packages, source code, app store publishing assistance
SaaS Services: Online platform access, API documentation, technical support
Consulting Projects: Consulting reports, technical recommendation documents, architecture diagrams

timeline.title: 4. Project Timeline
timeline.content: The project timeline will be specified in the Project Confirmation, including:
items: Project start date and estimated completion date
Phase milestones and delivery timepoints
Client review and feedback time windows
Possible extension conditions and procedures

payment.title: 5. Payment Terms
items: Deposit payment before project start (typically 30-50% of total project amount)
Milestone payments: Paid in stages according to project progress
Final payment: Remaining balance paid after project acceptance
Payment methods: Bank transfer, credit card, or other agreed payment methods
Late payment will incur late fees, and the Service Provider may suspend services

revisions.title: 6. Revisions and Changes
items: Number of free revisions included in the quote (typically 2-3 rounds)
Additional charges for revisions beyond the free allowance
Definition of major changes and re-quoting procedures
Change requests must be submitted in writing
Agreed changes will affect project timeline and costs

acceptance.title: 7. Acceptance Criteria
items: Client has an agreed review period after receiving deliverables (typically 5-10 business days)
Acceptance criteria based on functional specifications defined in the Project Confirmation
Any defects must be submitted in writing by the Client during the review period
After acceptance, the project is deemed complete and enters the warranty period
Failure to raise objections during the review period is deemed acceptance

warranty.title: 8. Warranty Terms
warranty.content: The Service Provider provides the following quality guarantees:
items: Free defect repair period of 30-90 days after project completion
Defects caused by the Service Provider will be repaired during the warranty period
Warranty does not cover issues caused by client change requests, third-party service changes, or misuse
SaaS services provide availability guarantees according to agreed Service Level Agreements (SLA)

ownership.title: 9. Intellectual Property Ownership
items: Source code IP for custom development projects transfers to Client upon full payment
Service Provider retains rights to use general technical solutions after removing client-specific information
SaaS platform architecture and core code remain property of the Service Provider
Client retains IP in content and brand materials they provide
Both parties are obligated to maintain confidentiality of each other's trade secrets

confidentiality.title: 10. Confidentiality
items: Maintain confidentiality of each other's trade secrets and information obtained during cooperation
Not disclose agreement content and project details to third parties
Use each other's information only to the extent necessary to perform this Agreement
Confidentiality obligations continue after termination of the Agreement
Breach of confidentiality obligations will result in corresponding legal liability

termination.title: 11. Agreement Termination
items: Both parties may terminate by mutual agreement
Either party may terminate if the other party materially breaches the Agreement
Client may terminate at any time but must pay for completed work
Service Provider may terminate if Client is overdue by more than 30 days
After termination, both parties shall return or destroy each other's confidential information

dispute.title: 12. Dispute Resolution
items: Both parties shall first attempt to resolve disputes through friendly negotiation
If negotiation fails, mediation or arbitration may be chosen
Arbitration shall be conducted at the Singapore International Arbitration Centre (SIAC)
This Agreement is governed by Singapore law
The losing party shall bear reasonable legal fees

contact.title: 13. Contact Information
contact.content: For any questions or concerns, please contact:
